document_api_meta.title: Redeem Info Callback
document_api_meta.env_desc: Send the redeem info related to the order to the TTS to complete the fulfillment.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

request_body_param.name: order_info_list
request_body_param.desc: Order lines that need to send redeem info related to the order id.

request_body_param.name: ^redeem_info
request_body_param.desc: The redeem item generated by your system that you need to callback.

request_body_param.name: ^^redeem_type
request_body_param.desc:
What redeem type that you callback.
'CODE' - type code
'URL' - type url
'CODE_PIN' - type pin and code

request_body_param.name: ^^redeem_data
request_body_param.desc:
Set the redeem data to this field with the maximum number of characters 1200. The example of each type is shown below,
CODE: abc12344
URL: https://{your_domain}/abc
CODE_PIN(json format): 
{"type": "CODE_PIN","code": "12345","pin": "abc"}

request_body_param.name: ^source_unique_id
request_body_param.desc: Optional, a unique id related to the order line in the caller system

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^order_statuses
response_param.desc: Callback result.For partial failure usage, if some of order line id in the request fail, it will be recorded with a none zero status_code.

response_param.name: ^^order_line_id
response_param.desc: Line order id, same as the input line order id.

response_param.name: ^^status_code
response_param.desc: Callback status of this line order id. A none zero code represent a failure callback.

error_code_list.msg: Internal error. Please try again. If the issue persists after multiple attempts, please contact platform support.
permission denied, please check if you have the permission to operate the orders.
req is invalid, please check your request params
Internal error. Please try again. If the issue persists after multiple attempts, please contact platform support.

sample_code.label: Go
sample_code.value:
// For more details about the SDK, refer to the documentation:
// https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/67c83e0799a75104986ae498
func fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackPost() {
    configuration := apis.NewConfiguration()
    configuration.AddAppInfo(appKey, appSecret)
    apiClient := apis.NewAPIClient(configuration)
    request := apiClient.FulfillmentV202601API.Fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackPost(context.Background())
    request = request.XTtsAccessToken("your access token")
    request = request.ContentType("application/json")
    request = request.ShopCipher("your shop cipher")
    fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBody := fulfillment_v202601.NewFulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBody()
    fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBody.SetOrderId("576461413038785752")
    fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBodyOrderInfoList := fulfillment_v202601.NewFulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBodyOrderInfoList()
    fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBodyOrderInfoList.SetOrderLineId("577086512123755123")
    fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBodyOrderInfoListRedeemInfo := fulfillment_v202601.NewFulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBodyOrderInfoListRedeemInfo()
    fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBodyOrderInfoListRedeemInfo.SetRedeemType("CODE")
    fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBodyOrderInfoListRedeemInfo.SetRedeemData("abc12344")
    fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBodyOrderInfoList.SetRedeemInfo(*fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBodyOrderInfoListRedeemInfo)
    fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBodyOrderInfoList.SetSourceUniqueId("134448484339393")
    fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBodyOrderInfoListList := []fulfillment_v202601.Fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBodyOrderInfoList{*fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBodyOrderInfoList}
    fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBody.SetOrderInfoList(fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBodyOrderInfoListList)
    request = request.Fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBody(*fulfillment202601RedeemInfoCallbackRequestBody)
    resp, httpResp, err := request.Execute()
    if err != nil || httpResp.StatusCode != 200 {
        fmt.Printf("productsRequest err:%v resbody:%s", err, httpResp.Body)
        return
    }
    if resp == nil {
        fmt.Printf("response is nil")
        return
    }
    if resp.GetCode()!= 0 {
        fmt.Printf("response business is error, errorCode:%d errorMessage:%s", resp.GetCode(), resp.GetMessage())
        return
    }
    respDataJson, _ := json.MarshalIndent(resp.GetData(), "", "  ")
    fmt.Println("response data:", string(respDataJson))
    return
}
